evals.prompt: Our overall payment success rate is about 91%. Stripe dashboard shows a mix of generic declines and some authentication_failed. Support keeps getting 'payment timed out' on mobile. We sell globally — Brazil and Germany are worst. What should we analyze and what payment methods should we add?
evals.expected_output: Error code analysis table + local methods for BR/DE + timeout actions.
expectations: Mentions payment success below 95% and reconciliation framing
Includes failure / error code analysis (table or grouped by family with causes and actions)
Includes recommended local payment methods checklist or table for Brazil and Germany
Actionable gateway or configuration angles (not only generic advice)

evals.prompt: Germany converts way below France on same catalog. Payments are mostly card and PayPal. No obvious site errors. Focus on pay step.
evals.expected_output: Country anomaly + DE local methods (SEPA, Klarna, PayPal emphasis) + decline analysis prompt.
expectations: Frames Germany vs baseline as payment or trust rail issue
Includes recommended local payment methods relevant to Germany
Includes error or decline analysis guidance even if codes not provided
Success criteria: local PM list + failure analysis structure

evals.prompt: Write product descriptions for three candles only.
evals.expected_output: Candle copy; no full payment funnel report (should-not-trigger).
expectations: Does not output full payment error code analysis as main deliverable for unrelated product copy task
Does not force Brazil/Germany payment method checklist unless user ties to checkout
